title: taraxacum lobuliferum
intro: Taraxacum lobuliferum, also known as the crested dandelion, is a species of flowering plant in the dandelion genus. It is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, derived from its roots and leaves. The health benefits of Taraxacum lobuliferum include its potential to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Taraxacum lobuliferum can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, to utilize its medicinal properties.
